name: cometcloud
description: CometCloud AI MCP server — live CIS scores, macro pulse, signal feed

auth.note: Public endpoints. Pro endpoints require X-API-Key header.

tools.name: cometcloud_get_cis_universe
tools.description: Get the full CIS leaderboard — all scored assets with grades, signals, pillars, and LAS

tools.name: cometcloud_get_cis_asset
tools.description: Get CIS score and 5-pillar breakdown for a specific asset by symbol (e.g., BTC, SOL, ONDO)

tools.name: cometcloud_get_macro_pulse
tools.description: Get current macro regime, BTC price, Fear & Greed Index, and BTC dominance

tools.name: cometcloud_get_signal_feed
tools.description: Get the current signal feed — positioning signals from 7 concurrent data sources

tools.name: cometcloud_get_top_assets
tools.description: Get the top N assets by CIS score (default: 10). Returns grade, signal, and LAS.

fallback_note: If /mcp endpoint not yet live, tools route to /api/v1/* FastAPI endpoints directly. See ROADMAP_A2A.md Phase 2 for MCP server deployment.
